causalAutopsy.notes: Increment 2a of the Bounded Accumulation standard shipped in #1241 (the standard + Increment 1 substrate). This retrofits the first real store (token-ledger.db, 256MB — the lone unbounded SQLite store; ResourceLedger already pruned) onto the standard's SQLite retention class, behind a dark-by-default flag.
